bank.retain_mission: Extract channel structure, audience and keyword decisions, creative tests, bidding strategies, and outcomes (CPA, ROAS, CTR) across PPC, paid social, and programmatic.
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about which channels run, target audiences, brand guardrails, attribution model, and creative principles that consistently work or fail. Ignore daily metric noise.

mental_models.name: Channel Mix
mental_models.source_query: Which channels are active, how are budgets split, and what audience/creative themes dominate each?

mental_models.name: Winning Creative
mental_models.source_query: What creative and bidding patterns drive performance? Include winning/losing tests with numbers.
